summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Binani Enterprises fintech marketing website. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all homepage sections, booking form functionality, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and form validation.
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_bookings_api.py cover all CRUD operations for bookings, contact, stats endpoints. Frontend uses shadcn calendar (react-day-picker) and sonner for toasts. No auth required.

backend: POST /api/bookings - creates booking with all fields ✓
POST /api/bookings - validates required fields (422 for missing) ✓
GET /api/bookings - returns list sorted by created_at desc ✓
MongoDB _id not exposed in any response ✓
frontend: Homepage renders all sections (hero, trust bar, problems, services, how-it-works, audience, dashboard preview, testimonials, CTA, footer) ✓
Navbar sticky with logo + links, Get Started and Book Consultation buttons route to /book ✓
Booking page shows left description + right form ✓
Booking form successful submission shows success screen with name echo ✓
Reason dropdown shows 4 options (Gateway Setup, Integration, Consultation, Other) ✓
Calendar date selection and time slot selection works ✓
Footer contains disclaimer 'We are not a payment gateway' ✓
Mobile viewport (375px) renders without horizontal scroll ✓
Sticky mobile CTA appears on home page ✓
